summary: Investigation card: Loop-wont-stop + silent save-loss project.json desync (post-208/213 refactor). Ruled out MPI-225 as cause; may subsume MPI-225 404 via same race.

Roots proven. Bug1 = Stop re-fires while loopArmed (genService _onLaneDrain:308); keep skip-one, make clearPendingQueue disarm loop. Bug2 = persistGroups (projectService.js:453) swallows /update-project failure -> memory-only ghost groups -> reload 404. Fix: check result.success + retry + ui:warning toast on exhaust.

Both fixes shipped + logic-verified. Bug1: clearPendingQueue() disarms loop (generationService.js) - Clear button = discoverable loop kill, Stop keeps skip-one per user. Bug2: persistGroups() (projectService.js) now checks result.success + retries 4x w/ backoff + ui:warning toast on exhaust. Guard test tests/persist-groups-retry.test.cjs (4 assertions pass). Syntax-clean both files. Needs user live-verify: real Loop batch + save-fail injection (checklist on card).

CORRECTED bug1 fix. User repro proved my first fix (clearPendingQueue disarm) was wrong-target: they press STOP, and Stop left loop half-dead (loopArmed stayed true) -> _onLaneDrain re-fired AND promptbox:generation-end gate blocked -> run button latched 'Loop' + first press only silently disarmed ('Loop button does nothing'). Reverted clearPendingQueue lever. Real fix: cancelRunningCueJob (genService.js) sets state.loopArmed=false BEFORE _onLaneDrain -> no re-fire + idle-emit ungated -> button recovers to 'Cue'. Traced full recovery chain. Logic-model test passes. Bug2 (persistGroups retry+toast) unchanged, still correct+independent. Needs user live repro.

BUG1 LIVE-VERIFIED (reload only, no app restart needed - renderer JS re-fetch). User armed Loop, pressed Stop -> stopped everything, current gen cancelled, no more cards. Expected result. Stop-disarm fix confirmed. BUG2 (persistGroups retry+toast) still logic-only - hard to force (needs disk-full/read-only mid-batch); defensive, low-risk.

REVERTED my Stop-disarm change (was wrong - user wants Stop=skip-one, loop KEEPS going; end loop only via tapping armed Loop button). generationService.js now == HEAD (no diff, verified via git). projectService.js bug2 (persistGroups retry+toast) still in place + independent. Desired: Stop cancels current gen + loop re-fires next; Loop button tap = only disarm. Awaiting user retest of ORIGINAL behavior (post-revert reload) to pin the true defect - card claim ('loop wont stop') contradicts user report 1 ('Stop halts + Loop btn dead'). Not touching genService until ground truth seen.

BUG1 refined: user confirmed Stop=skip-one loop KEEPS going (correct now, my disarm reverted). Remaining defect: after Stop the re-fired next gen RUNS (status bar) but its gallery latent/preview card never paints - invisible until complete. Root = DOUBLE DRAIN: store cancel (exec.cancel) synchronously drains lane + loop-re-fires INSIDE activeGenerations.cancel, advancing _lanes[lane].active to the NEW job; then cancelRunningCueJob's belt-and-suspenders _onLaneDrain(lane) at :483 fired AGAIN on that fresh job -> double re-fire + placeholder churn -> preview never mounts. Fix: capture _cancelledIntent before cancel; only run the :483 drain if _lanes[lane].active === _cancelledIntent (genuine stuck-lane). Skips it when a re-fire already advanced the lane. genService.js only. Syntax+model tests pass. Intermittent/timing bug -> needs user live repro.

Ship-what-works: double-fire guard (genService) live-verified + persistGroups retry (projectService) logic-verified KEPT. All gallery placeholder point-fixes REVERTED to HEAD (6 attempts, ordering race unsolved) + all instrumentation stripped. Display race → MPI-234 (parked, arch maps saved). Loop = skip-one/keep-going per user.
Closed. Two fixes shipped (genService double-fire guard live-verified; projectService save-retry logic-verified). Display race → MPI-234. Instrumentation fully stripped.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
